description:
PROFITABLE TURNKEY BUILDING & CONSTRUCTION BUSINESS: GUTTER COMPANY - $306K SDE

Established in 2022, this thriving building and construction service business in Salida, CA generates $950,000 in annual revenue with strong $306,000 seller's discretionary earnings (32% SDE margin). The company operates from a 4,000 sq ft facility with $2,275 monthly lease.

BUSINESS HIGHLIGHTS:
• Fully staffed turnkey operation with documented systems
• Strong 32% SDE margin demonstrating operational efficiency
• $300,000 inventory included in purchase price
• Absentee owner model - business runs independently
• Established customer base with year-round demand
• Complete standard operating procedures and employee handbook
• Trained staff utilizing Housecall Pro management system

FINANCIAL PERFORMANCE:
• Annual Revenue: $950,000
• Seller's Discretionary Earnings: $306,000
• EBITDA: $236,000
• Furniture, Fixtures & Equipment: $75,000
• Inventory: $300,000 (included)

GROWTH OPPORTUNITIES:
The local service market shows consistent growth with fragmented competition. Expansion potential includes:
• Service area expansion to neighboring communities
• Enhanced digital marketing and social media presence
• Complementary service offerings
• Additional staffing for increased capacity
• Recurring service contract development
• Leveraging substantial inventory for revenue growth

SUPPORT & TRAINING:
Seller provides comprehensive 3-month hands-on training covering staff management, Housecall Pro operations, and business processes. Complete documentation package includes SOPs, employee handbook, and training videos. Seller available as temporary Responsible Managing Officer for licensing transition support.
